zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Henry Ferneley於1490年出生在英國素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得時，他的父親William Fernley30歲，母親Lady Margaret verch Thomas46歲。他於1517年與Lady Agnes Daundy在英國素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Henry Ferneley于1490年出生在英国素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得时，他的父亲William Fernley30岁，母亲Lady Margaret verch Thomas46岁。他于1517年与Lady Agnes Daundy在英国素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1556年在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: Ferneley
meanings: Irish: Fearn, a helmet, and lac, people, meaning a warlike people

variants.name: Fernly
meanings: Irish: Fearn, a helmet, and lac, people, meaning a warlike people

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Henry Ferneley was born in 1490, in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England, his father, William Fernley, was 30 and his mother, Lady Margaret verch Thomas, was 46. He married Lady Agnes Daundy in 1517, in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1556, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Henry Ferneley est né en 1490, à Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Fernley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret verch Thomas, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Daundy en 1517, à Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1556, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Henry Ferneley 1490 in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Fernley 30 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret verch Thomas 46. Er hat 1517 in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England Lady Agnes Daundy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1556 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Henry Ferneley è nato il nel 1490 nel Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William Fernley, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret verch Thomas, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Daundy nel 1517, nel Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1556, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Henry Ferneleyが1490年にイギリススフォルククレエティング スト ペターで生まれた時，父William Fernleyは30歳，母Lady Margaret verch Thomasは46歳であった。1517年にイギリススフォルククレエティング スト ペターでLady Agnes Daundyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1556年に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリススフォルククレエティング スト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Henry Ferneley(이)가 1490년 영국 수폴크 크릿잉 스트 피터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fernley(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret verch Thomas(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1517년 영국 수폴크 크릿잉 스트 피터에서 Lady Agnes Daundy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 크릿잉 스트 피터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Henry Ferneley nasceu em 1490, em Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Fernley, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret verch Thomas, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Daundy em 1517, em Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1556, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Henry Ferneley родился в 1490 г. в местности критинг ст питир, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Fernley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret verch Thomas, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Daundy в 1517 г. в местности критинг ст питир, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1556 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности критинг ст питир, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Henry Ferneley nació en 1490, en Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Fernley, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret verch Thomas, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Lady Agnes Daundy en 1517, en Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1556, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
